name: semkeep
description: semkeep — the project companion for AI coding agents: code intelligence, operational memory, and a greenlight done-gate, as a local MCP server.

plugins.name: semkeep
plugins.description: Code intelligence (search by meaning, definitions, callers, imports), operational memory (verified recipes/gotchas/dead-ends that persist across sessions), and greenlight done-gates. Local, offline-capable; ambient API keys never touched. Bundles a Grep nudge hook.
